revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月廿八]][[zh:八月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 28|qq=August 28}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kōwa (Heian period)|en|Kōwa (Heian period)|qid=Q1193890|lt=Kōwa|1=Kōwa (Heian period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1099|en|1099|qid=Q19496|lt=1099|1=1099}} {{ill|September 15|en|September 15|qid=Q2846|lt=September 15|1=September 15}}) – {{ill|Earthquake|en|Earthquake|qid=Q7944|lt=Earthquake|1=Earthquake}} と {{ill|Epidemic|ja|疫病|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Epidemic|1=ekibyou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17239211}} のため {{ill|Jōtoku|en|Jōtoku|qid=Q1193901|lt=Chōtoku|1=Jōtoku}} より {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} to Kōwa. * {{ill|Ryakuō|ja|略応|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryakuō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/{{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1338|en|1338|qid=Q6044|lt=1338|1=1338}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|qid=Q2927|lt=October 11|1=October 11}}) – {{ill|Northern Court|en|Northern Court|qid=Q1201819|lt=Northern Court|1=Northern Court}} が {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu|1=Jianwu}} より {{ill|Ryakuō|ja|略応|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryakuō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}) – {{ill|Wakadoshiyori|en|Wakadoshiyori|qid=Q1036547|lt=Wakadoshiyori|1=Wakadoshiyori}} {{ill|Inaba Masayasu|en|Inaba Masayasu|qid=Q11596944|lt=Inaba Masayasu|1=Inaba Masayasu}} による {{ill|Tairō|en|Tairō|qid=Q956844|lt=Tairō|1=Tairō}} {{ill|Hotta Masatoshi|en|Hotta Masatoshi|qid=Q936047|lt=Horita Masatoshi|1=Hotta Masatoshi}} 刺殺事件. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|qid=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}}) – From the {{ill|Black Ships|en|Black Ships|qid=Q1136943|lt=Black Ships|1=Black Ships}}, in order to defend Edo Bay, construction of a coastal battery, {{ill|Odaiba|ja|御台場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odaiba|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 台場|1=daiba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10856363}}, was begun off the coast of Shinagawa. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|qid=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}}) – The court issued the {{ill|Emancipation edict|ja|身分解放令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emancipation edict|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 解放令|1=Q11630918|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11630918}}, abolishing the designations of {{ill|Eta|ja|穢多|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eta|1=eta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11597184}} and {{ill|Hinin|en|Hinin|qid=Q3135765|lt=Hinin|1=Hinin}}. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|qid=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|qid=Q2963|lt=October 16|1=October 16}}) – {{ill|Chōyo Sensai|ja|長与専斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōyo Sensai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 長與專齋|1=Nagayo Sensai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3025170}}, a medical scholar and bureaucrat (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|qid=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|785|en|785|qid=Q30554|lt=785|1=785}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|qid=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}}) – {{ill|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|en|Ōtomo no Yakamochi|qid=Q386308|lt=Ōtomo no Yakamochi|1=Ōtomo no Yakamochi}}, a {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} (born {{ill|718|en|718|qid=Q23534|lt=718|1=718}}). * {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|qid=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō|1=Kenchō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1253|en|1253|qid=Q5498|lt=1253|1=1253}} {{ill|September 22|en|September 22|qid=Q2889|lt=September 22|1=September 22}}) – {{ill|Dōgen|en|Dōgen|qid=Q318064|lt=Dōgen|1=Dōgen}} <ref>{{Cite book |和書 |author=中村元ほか（編） |date=2002-10 |title=岩波仏教辞典 |edition=第二版 |publisher=岩波書店 |pages=752-753 |qq=}}</ref>、the founder of {{ill|Sōtō|en|Sōtō|qid=Q749085|lt=Sōtō Zen|1=Sōtō}} (born {{ill|1200|en|1200|qid=Q5224|lt=1200|1=1200}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|qid=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|en|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qid=Q434415|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki}} of the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}}, the 15th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} (born {{ill|1537|en|1537|qid=Q6461|lt=1537|1=1537}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|qid=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}}) – {{ill|Machida Hisakabe|ja|町田久倍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machida Hisakabe|1=Machida Hisamasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11578271}}, a samurai (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|qid=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|qid=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – {{ill|Odai no Kata|en|Odai no Kata|qid=Q5366163|lt=Otai no Kata|1=Odai no Kata}} (of Dentsūin), the biological mother of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (born {{ill|1528|en|1528|qid=Q6415|lt=1528|1=1528}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|qid=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}} {{ill|October 5|en|October 5|qid=Q2930|lt=October 5|1=October 5}}) – {{ill|Araki Mataemon|en|Araki Mataemon|qid=Q4783833|lt=Araki Mataemon|1=Araki Mataemon}}, a master of {{ill|Kenjutsu|en|Kenjutsu|qid=Q249608|lt=Kenjutsu|1=Kenjutsu}} (born {{ill|1599|en|1599|qid=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}}). * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}) – {{ill|Hotta Masatoshi|en|Hotta Masatoshi|qid=Q936047|lt=Horita Masatoshi|1=Hotta Masatoshi}}, a {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=Daimyō|1=Daimyo}} and {{ill|Tairō|en|Tairō|qid=Q956844|lt=Tairō|1=Tairō}} of the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}} (born {{ill|1634|en|1634|qid=Q6872|lt=1634|1=1634}}). * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|qid=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}) – {{ill|Inaba Masayasu|en|Inaba Masayasu|qid=Q11596944|lt=Inaba Masayasu|1=Inaba Masayasu}}, a {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=Daimyō|1=Daimyo}} and {{ill|Wakadoshiyori|en|Wakadoshiyori|qid=Q1036547|lt=Wakadoshiyori|1=Wakadoshiyori}} of the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}} (born {{ill|1640|en|1640|qid=Q6901|lt=1640|1=1640}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|qid=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – {{ill|Tachibana Akemi|en|Tachibana Akemi|qid=Q635122|lt=Tachibana Akiran|1=Tachibana Akemi}}, a {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} (born {{ill|1812|en|1812|qid=Q6933|lt=1812|1=1812}}). == Commemorations == == Fictional Events == === Births === * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|qid=Q2927|lt=October 11|1=October 11}}) – A character named Machi from the anime {{ill|Hiwou War Chronicles|en|Hiwou War Chronicles|qid=Q2349865|lt=Kikōkiden Hiō Senki|1=Hiwou War Chronicles}}.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|27|8|29|7|28|9|8|0828|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:8 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:August 28 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 8월 28일]] [[ja:8月28日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:八月廿八]]
[[ar:August 28 (Lunisolar)]]
